title: FlameAndIce
description:
New enchantment: Frozen has been added.
When Fire Aspect and Frozen are applied, hitting or attacking a block will produce fire or ice effects.
body:
New enchantment: Frozen has been added.
Frozen enchantment slows down the entities it hits
And at Lv2, you can slow down the movement even more.
When Fire Aspect and Frozen are applied, hitting or attacking a block will produce fire or ice effects.
